# Agentic Frontend

Source pack: `.agent-context/skills/frontend/`

1. `.agent-context/skills/frontend/README.md`
2. `.agent-context/skills/frontend/ui-architecture.md`

## Workflow

1. Preserve design consistency with existing product language.
2. Prioritize responsive and accessible interaction patterns.
3. Validate visual intent, then polish motion with purpose.
4. Verify behavior on desktop and mobile viewports.
